expectations.text: Identifies the pregen thread is likely dead (silent death bug or stalled)
expectations.evidence: Directly identifies Bug #2 by name, explains the missing try-catch, CompletionException propagation, and thread death mechanism

expectations.text: Explains that 'infinite' time remaining means momentary CPS is zero (division by zero)
expectations.evidence: 'Time remaining: infinite means momentary CPS is actually 0 (division by zero)'

expectations.text: Recommends stopping and restarting the pregen (dhs pregen stop then start)
Mentions that restarting skips already-generated LODs
expectations.evidence: 'The pregen skips LODs that already exist in data.sqlite, so the 21% of LODs already generated will be skipped quickly'

expectations.text: Suggests a diagnostic step (jstack for worker threads, or checking data.sqlite mtime)
expectations.evidence: Both methods described: 'jstack <server-pid> | grep DHSupport' and 'stat plugins/DHSupport/data.sqlite'
